label_source.bots: layerzero_sybil (verified public sybil list, pulled from Base via Dune)
label_source.humans: conservative behavioural proxy (low-freq / diverse / slow non-sybil Base senders)
label_source.note: academic_bot_addresses.csv and academic_human_addresses.csv were EMPTY and unused

known_limitations: priority_base_ratio uses an approximated base fee (no per-block base fee in source data)
zero_byte_ratio computed on the first 256 calldata bytes
notes: Stateless cascade detector trained on independent labels: verified LayerZero sybils as bots vs a conservative non-sybil human proxy. The '>2000 tx' heuristic is gone. in_known_bot_list is permanently excluded (leakage). Threshold fixed at 0.7 per spec.
